title: Cucumber Mint Cooler
description: A refreshing cucumber and mint cooler with lemon, ginger, and a hint of black salt. Perfect for hot summer days.

ingredients.note: peeled if the skin is thick

steps: Roughly chop the cucumbers and add them to a blender.
Add the mint leaves, ginger, lemon juice, honey (or stevia), black salt, roasted cumin powder, black pepper, and cold water.
Strain through a fine mesh sieve if you prefer a smoother drink, or leave unstrained for extra fiber.
Taste and adjust the sweetness, lemon juice, or salt as needed.
Pour over ice and garnish with cucumber slices and fresh mint leaves.
notes: Chill the cucumbers before blending for an extra-refreshing drink.
Replace half the water with sparkling water just before serving for a fizzy cooler.
Add a green chili while blending for a spicy Indian-style twist.
For extra protein, blend in 2–3 tablespoons of Greek yogurt to make a creamy cucumber cooler.
